styles.name: 赛博蓝图 Cyber Blueprint
styles.best_for: Codex 教程、软件演示、AI 工作流
styles.prompt: Create a cyber blueprint tech canvas video with dark blue-gray grid background, cyan neon workflow lines, glowing process cards, and precise software tutorial pacing.

styles.name: 黑金发布会 Dark Launch
styles.best_for: 课程发布、产品发布、成交案例
styles.prompt: Create a premium dark launch video with black background, gold highlights, strong title hierarchy, spotlight motion, and polished launch-event pacing.

styles.name: 玻璃仪表盘 Glass Dashboard
styles.best_for: 数据看板、运营复盘、工具介绍
styles.prompt: Create a glassmorphism dashboard video with translucent panels, soft glowing borders, modular information layout, and clean data-driven transitions.

styles.name: 数据雷达 Data Radar
styles.best_for: 分析报告、竞品研究、账号诊断
styles.prompt: Create a data radar analysis video with scanning rings, coordinate grids, animated metric points, and analytical motion graphics.

styles.name: 极简科技 Minimal Tech
styles.best_for: 高质感口播、知识讲解、观点短视频
styles.prompt: Create a minimal tech explainer video with restrained typography, thin line reveals, generous whitespace, and understated premium motion.

styles.name: 产品路线图 Product Roadmap
styles.best_for: 方法论拆解、教程步骤、项目路径
styles.prompt: Create a product roadmap video with animated progress lines, staged method cards, node activation, and clear step-by-step tutorial rhythm.
